name: lifeos-enterprise
description: LifeOS Enterprise — sistema operacional pessoal com governança organizacional, RBAC, billing, compliance, integrações OAuth 2.0 e automação.

scripts.deploy:cf: npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name lifeos-enterprise --branch main
scripts.test:enterprise: npm run build && npm run test:responsive && npm run test:functional && npm run test:v11 && npm run test:admin && npm run test:user && npm run test:documents
